backend.changelog: Selective BOM export: when you tick assemblies in the BOM tree, the Excel/CSV/XML export now produces one file per ticked assembly (each is that assembly's own sub-BOM), instead of a single export for the top assembly. Ticking nested assemblies is skipped (the parent's file already contains them). With nothing ticked, the full top-level BOM is exported as before.

cadBridge.changelog: Supports selective generate runs from the gateway (1.1.42+): outputs are produced only for the assemblies ticked in the BOM tree, while the root assembly stays open without being exported.
